ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* System or product affected by the issue */,
  "issue_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of issue (e.g., security, bug, enhancement) */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Priority level of the issue */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Current status of the issue */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary description of the issue */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the issue */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "assigned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the resolution */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue */,
  "reproducibility" TEXT /* Reproducibility of the issue */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the issue on the system or users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_issue_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_type_id") REFERENCES issue_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system or product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system or product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue that was changed */,
  "changed_attribute" TEXT /* Attribute of the issue that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the attribute */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the attribute */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being assigned */,
  "assigned_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member or department assigned to the issue */,
  "assigned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was assigned */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_assigned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_assigned_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team belongs to */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reporter, developer, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue as reported by the user */,
  "reproducibility" TEXT /* Reproducibility of the issue as reported by the user */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the issue on the system or users as reported by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_reports_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the comment (public, private, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES issue_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the vote */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was submitted */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_votes_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the attachment is related to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_attachments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_attachments_upload_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
